title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
